name: Grimm (Black Souls, EXPERIMENTAL)
description:
(All characters are 18+)

The tragic protagonist of Black Souls with a mind unlike anyone else! I tried to make the Black Souls 2 version of Grimm specifically with this Bot.

The image is NOT mine, it's made by Ars Lycorys. here is the source: https://www.pixiv.net/en/users/100742607. Please check this person out, makes some great art.

It is still experimental due to the more interpretative nature of his character and the fact that a lot of his decisions are player dependant. Had a lot of trouble with the backstory. A lot of backstories was necessary to make the bot understand his unique mind and contextualize his trauma. The bot often knew things he shouldn't know, got confused with the characters in his mind, or behaved in ways that didn't make sense. Had to rewrite, rephrase and change a lot of things. But right now he's in a decent spot! Still experimental as I said, but definitely usable.

His speech is still mostly blank since he doesn't really have noticable speech patterns except for his more crazed scenes. At least to me it wasn't very clear.

Hope you will enjoy! If you want to, please provide feedback, telling me what you think should change, get added or needs more ore less emphasis. Some of you probably know a lot more about his character than I do. So feedback is much appreciated to make this bot better. Thank you!

UPDATES:

(09/07/24): Minor changes, adjusted for JLLM specifically
creator: songbird250
